faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bees in Garden City South?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day bee removal service throughout Garden City South. Most residential bee removals are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on hive size and location. We understand bee issues require urgent attention and prioritize emergency calls.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 bee removal cost include?
faqs.answer: Our pricing covers complete inspection, safe bee and hive removal, treatment of the affected area, and prevention recommendations. The final cost depends on hive size, location accessibility, and whether structural repairs are needed. We provide free estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we humanely relocate honey bee colonies to local beekeepers, supporting pollinator conservation. For aggressive species like yellow jackets or carpenter bees causing structural damage, we use targeted removal methods. We'll explain the best approach for your specific situation in Garden City South.

faqs.question: How do I prevent bees from returning after removal?
faqs.answer: After removing the hive, we thoroughly clean the area to eliminate pheromones that attract new colonies. We seal entry points, provide exclusion recommendations, and can install preventative treatments. Our service includes a follow-up guarantee to ensure bees don't return to the same location.
